title: carex novae-angliae var. collecta
intro: Carex novae-angliae var. collecta is a specific variety of sedge plant, a type of perennial grass-like plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carex novae-angliae var. collecta include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing irritated skin. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
